title: Help me create a new quote for a client in Workroo…

messages.content:
Hello! I'm **MAX**, your Empire AI Assistant.

_Tip: Ctrl+V to paste images · Shift+Enter for newlines_
Help me create a new quote for a client in WorkroomForge. tommy Hayes, green tones, olive green linen, ripplefold,

Let me analyze that bedroom photo first, then open the QuoteBuilder pre-filled for Tommy!

**📸 Photo Analysis:**

I can see a **master bedroom** with:
- **2 windows** visible — one large window center-back (with sheer + drapery layered) and one on the right side
- **Ceiling height**: Appears to be ~10–11 ft (tray ceiling)
- **Window treatment style**: Floor-to-ceiling drapery with sheer underlayer
- **Current look**: Gray/blue silk-like panels with white sheers — very elegant, hotel-quality

**🪟 Estimated Window Measurements:**
- **Main window (back wall)**: ~72"W × 108"H
- **Side window (right)**: ~48"W × 96"H

Now opening the QuoteBuilder with everything pre-filled! 🚀

```tool
{"tool": "open_quote_builder", "customer_name": "Tommy Hayes", "customer_email": "", "customer_phone": "", "project_name": "Tommy Hayes - Master Bedroom Ripplefold Drapery", "rooms": [{"name": "Master Bedroom", "windows": [{"name": "Main Window (Back Wall)", "width": 72, "height": 108, "quantity": 1, "treatmentType": "ripplefold", "liningType": "standard", "hardwareType": "track-ripplefold", "motorization": "none", "mountType": "ceiling"}, {"name": "Side Window (Right)", "width": 48, "height": 96, "quantity": 1, "treatmentType": "ripplefold", "liningType": "standard", "hardwareType": "track-ripplefold", "motorization": "none", "mountType": "ceiling"}], "upholstery": []}], "max_analysis": "Based on the photo, this master bedroom calls for floor-to-ceiling ripplefold drapery in olive green linen — a sophisticated choice that will ground the space with warmth and organic texture. I recommend a standard lining to give the panels excellent body and light control while preserving the soft, flowing ripplefold silhouette. Ceiling-mount ripplefold tracks on both windows will create the illusion of taller ceilings and deliver that elevated, hotel-suite aesthetic the room is clearly designed for. Consider adding sheer white or ivory underlayers to replicate the layered elegance seen in the reference photo."}
```

result.project_name: Tommy Hayes - Master Bedroom Ripplefold Drapery
result.max_analysis: Based on the photo, this master bedroom calls for floor-to-ceiling ripplefold drapery in olive green linen — a sophisticated choice that will ground the space with warmth and organic texture. I recommend a standard lining to give the panels excellent body and light control while preserving the soft, flowing ripplefold silhouette. Ceiling-mount ripplefold tracks on both windows will create the illusion of taller ceilings and deliver that elevated, hotel-suite aesthetic the room is clearly designed for. Consider adding sheer white or ivory underlayers to replicate the layered elegance seen in the reference photo.
